variants: Alaric Bergstrom holds a professional license in Gargoyle Aesthete Documentation and has made significant contributions to the field of Finnish consonant gradation. His work has been featured in the Glacier Fern Review, where his research findings have added depth to scholarly discussions. Alaric is also dedicated to community service as the Urban Greening Lead for Mosswalkers, spearheading efforts to improve urban environments through increased greenery. His academic journey began at Peregrine Hill Academy, where he built a strong foundation for his career in the arts and sciences.
